---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Describe the solution you'd like
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Impact
<!-- Mark with an [x] the areas this would affect -->
- [ ] Solution template structure
- [ ] Item templates (feature/domain)
- [ ] Source generators
- [ ] Layer encapsulation / DI model
- [ ] Framework project (`ProjectTemplate.Framework`)
- [ ] Documentation

## Additional context
Add any other context, code examples, or screenshots about the feature request here.
